tools.name: convert
tools.description: Convert between different measurement units. Supports length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, time, and data units. Use this for any unit conversion between metric, imperial, and digital units. For listing available units or seeing categories, use list_units, categories, or help instead.

tools.name: list_units
tools.description: List all available units in a specific category. Use this to see which units are supported for conversion in a given category. For performing actual conversions, use convert instead.

category.description: The category to list units for (e.g., 'length', 'weight', 'temperature', 'area', 'volume', 'speed', 'time', 'data')

tools.name: categories
tools.description: Show all supported unit conversion categories. Use this to discover what types of conversions are available. For listing units within a specific category, use list_units instead.

tools.name: help
tools.description: Show detailed help and information for a specific unit category. Use this to learn about the units and conversion formulas available for a category. For listing all categories, use categories instead.

category.description: The category to show help for (e.g., 'length', 'weight', 'temperature', 'area', 'volume', 'speed', 'time', 'data')

messages.content: Hi there, I'm looking for some help with converting different types of measurements. What kinds of unit conversions can you help me with? I usually need things like temperature and distance for everyday situations.

I can help you convert between many different types of measurements! Here are the categories I support:

- **Length** (distance) - meters, feet, miles, kilometers, inches, etc.
- **Weight** - pounds, kilograms, grams, ounces, etc.
- **Temperature** - Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin
- **Area** - square feet, acres, hectares, square meters, etc.
- **Volume** - gallons, liters, cups, milliliters, etc.
- **Speed** - mph, km/h, knots, m/s, etc.
- **Time** - hours, minutes, seconds, days, weeks, etc.
- **Data** - bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes, etc.

You've got exactly what you need: **temperature** and **length** (distance) are both available! Whether it's converting Fahrenheit to Celsius or miles to kilometers, I've got you covered.

Just tell me what you'd like to convert (like "convert 75 degrees Fahrenheit to Celsius" or "how many kilometers is 5 miles?") and I'll do the math for you!

That sounds great! I'm trying to figure out what to wear when I go out later. Can you convert 68 degrees Fahrenheit to Celsius for me? I always see weather apps showing different units and want to get a better sense of what it actually feels like.

68°F is exactly **20°C** — that's a beautiful, mild spring-like temperature! 🎉

So for your outfit, you probably don't need a heavy coat. A light jacket or sweater would be perfect, or if you're feeling warm, just a t-shirt might do. It's the kind of weather where you can comfortably sit outside or take a walk.

Enjoy your outing! Let me know if you need any other conversions.
Thanks! Now I'm planning a road trip and need to figure out how many kilometers is 50 miles? I want to get a better sense of how far I'll actually be driving.

50 miles is about **80.5 kilometers**!

That's a solid drive — depending on the speed limits and traffic, you're looking at roughly an hour to an hour and a half of driving. Not too bad for a road trip!

Just for reference, the conversion factor is about 1.6 — so you can quickly estimate that miles × 1.6 ≈ kilometers.

Safe travels on your trip! Let me know if you need help with any other conversions.
